app.name: OC Save Keeper
app.slogan: Safe save backup and cross-device sync
sync.uploading: Uploading save data to the cloud...
auth.title: Dropbox Setup
auth.setup_time: Generate a Dropbox sign-in link on the Switch, approve it on your phone or PC, then finish setup here.
auth.step1: 1. Press [Open Sign-In] to generate the authorization link.
auth.step2: 2. Open that link on your phone or PC, then finish sign-in and approval there.
auth.step3: 3. If auto return fails, enter only the short authorization code shown by Dropbox.
auth.step4: 4. Paste the returned URL or authorization code on the Switch, then press [Connect Dropbox].
auth.status_waiting_link: Ready to generate an authorization link
auth.status_waiting_code: Link ready, waiting for pasted code
auth.waiting_link_hint: Start by generating the sign-in link with [Open Sign-In].
auth.waiting_code_hint: Open the link on your phone or PC, then enter the returned URL or authorization code.
auth.ready_to_connect_hint: Authorization data is ready. Press [Connect Dropbox] to finish the token exchange.
auth.missing_config_hint: This build cannot start Dropbox OAuth until it is rebuilt with DROPBOX_APP_KEY.
auth.token_placeholder: Paste the Dropbox authorization code here...
auth.tip: One-time PKCE setup, then the saved refresh token is reused.
auth.browser_opened: Sign-in link generated. Open it on your phone or PC, then enter the returned URL or authorization code.
auth.browser_failed: The Switch build does not open the browser directly. Open the shown link on another device, then enter the returned URL or authorization code.
auth.link_ready: Sign-in link ready. Open the shown link on another device, then enter the returned URL or authorization code.
history.title: Version History List
ui.pick_user_hint: Switch between user saves and device saves here.
ui.selection_footer: The title list will rescan for the selected save type.
ui.auth_footer: Scan QR or open the sign-in link on another device, approve access, then paste the returned URL or code.
ui.auth_footer_new: Scan the QR code with your phone to sign in and approve the connection.
ui.action_upload_hint: Upload the latest backup to Dropbox
auth.status_authenticated: You are already connected to Dropbox.
auth.status_waiting_scan: Scan the QR code with your phone to login.
auth.status_bridge_failed: Failed to start login session. Check your internet.
auth.status_failed: Session expired or failed. Please try again.
auth.status_consume_failed: Failed to exchange tokens. Please try again.
auth.confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to disconnect from Dropbox?
